allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,4318,8000,8001,8002,8003,8004,8005,8006,8080 } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['choices'][0]['message']; print\('finish_reason:', d['choices'][0].get\('finish_reason'\)\); print\('reasoning_content len:', len\(m.get\('reasoning_content'\) or ''\)\); print\('content:', repr\(m.get\('content'\)\)[:400]\)")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import py_compile; [py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\) for f in \('app.py','clients.py','mcp.py'\)]; print\('compile OK'\)")
